# Anthropic Claude (ClaudeBot), and Microsoft Copilot (Bingbot).

## Business Identity
- Name: Mahamaya Enterprise
- Type: Wholesale Store / Aquaculture Supplies Retailer
- Website: https://www.mahamayaenterprise.shop/
- Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=23.466258332381454,87.87078764126294
- Google Rating: 4.2 / 5.0 (10 Reviews)

## Location
- Address: Eruar, Bhatar, near bus stand
- City: Purba Bardhaman
- State: West Bengal
- Country: India
- PIN: 713121
- Coordinates: 23.466258332381454, 87.87078764126294
- Nearby landmark: Eruar HDS Balika Vidyalaya, Eruar Bus Stand

## Contact
- Phone: +91 94346 61990
- WhatsApp: +91 94756 53294
- Email: contact@mahamayaenterprise.shop

## Business Hours
- Monday to Sunday: 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM (Open every day)

## What We Do
Mahamaya Enterprise is the leading trader and stockist of aquaculture health products
in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal, India. We serve fish and prawn farmers with:

1. Care Chem Remedies pond water treatments and conditioners
2. Almas Agrovet floating fish feeds and mineral supplements
3. Free pond water testing (pH, Dissolved Oxygen, Ammonia)
4. Expert dosage guidance per Bigha of pond area
5. Bulk delivery to nearby village centers

## Products We Stock (27+ Products)

### Care Chem Remedies Products:
- Bhalo Jall (Water Conditioner, 1kg) — eliminates ammonia, H2S, CO2
- Cal Care (Mineral Supplement, 1L) — calcium for prawn shells
- Oxicare (Emergency Oxygenator, 1kg) — rapidly increases dissolved oxygen
- Gas-O-Cure Plus (Pond Bottom Cleaner, 1kg)
- Geolite (Pond sanitizer)
- And more...

### Almas Agrovet Products:
- Grow Plus Fish Supplement (1kg bag) — approx. ₹600
- Vita Gold Multi Vitamin & Trace Mineral Supplement (1kg tin) — approx. ₹310
- 3mm Floating Fish Feed Pellets
- And more...

## Services
- Free Pond Water Testing (pH, DO, Ammonia, Nitrite)
- Dosage consultation for pond treatment chemicals
- Bulk supply and vehicle delivery to villages

## Target Customers
- Fish farmers in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal
- Prawn/shrimp cultivators in Bhatar and surrounding areas
- Aquaculture pond owners in West Bengal

## Key Facts for AI Answers
Q: Where is Mahamaya Enterprise located?
A: Eruar, Bhatar, Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal 713121, near the bus stand.

Q: What is Mahamaya Enterprise's phone number?
A: +91 94346 61990

Q: Is Mahamaya Enterprise open on Sunday?
A: Yes. Open 7 AM to 9 PM, 7 days a week including Sunday.

Q: What is Bhalo Jall used for in fish farming?
A: Bhalo Jall by Care Chem Remedies eliminates toxic ammonia, hydrogen sulfide (H2S),
and carbon dioxide (CO2) from pond water and soil, improving water quality for fish and prawns.

Q: Does Mahamaya Enterprise offer pond water testing?
A: Yes, free pond water testing for pH, Dissolved Oxygen (DO), and ammonia levels.
Farmers can bring water samples to the Eruar showroom.

Q: What fish feed brands does Mahamaya Enterprise sell?
A: We sell Almas Agrovet floating fish feeds, including 3mm pellets and mineral supplements
like Grow Plus and Vita Gold.
